item.title: Deadly California avalanche highlights inherent risks in the backcountry
item.description: The recovery of skiers killed in the deadliest U.S. avalanche in almost 45 years is dragging out because of what experts say is a prime rule for rescu...

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
item.description: Crews hope to resume efforts to recover the bodies of eight people killed in an avalanche in California’s Sierra Nevada and search for a person missin...

item.title: NASA conducts second rocket fueling test that will decide when Artemis astronauts head to the moon
item.description: NASA has taken another crack at fueling its giant moon rocket after leaks halted the initial dress rehearsal

item.title: Alaska to replace Black Veterans Memorial Bridge, saving part as tribute to Alaska Highway builders
item.description: A historic bridge in Alaska named for segregated Black soldiers who battled extreme weather and terrain to help build the first road link between Alas...

item.title: 6 women killed in California avalanche were among 8 close friends and experienced skiers on trip
item.description: The six women killed in an avalanche in California’s Sierra Nevada were among a group of eight close friends and experienced backcountry skiers on a t...
